overall.description: Gameplay footage from a Harry Potter game (Hogwarts Legacy) showing a student character with red hair and Gryffindor robes exploring Hogwarts castle. The character walks through the Great Hall, transitions through corridors and staircases, and interacts with a cat in a grand entrance hall.

scene_state.functional_zone: great hall with floating candles and dining tables

events.description: character approaches and opens the large wooden exit doors

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the great hall toward the exit, passing students seated at long tables

entered.detail: hundreds of candles floating in the air illuminating the high ceiling
long wooden tables with students seated eating meals
massive stone fireplace with fire burning
large ornate wooden doors at the far end of the hall

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the vast Great Hall illuminated by thousands of floating candles. Students sit at long wooden tables eating meals, while a large fireplace burns on the left wall. The character heads toward the large wooden exit doors at the far end of the hall.

scene_state.functional_zone: entry vestibule with suits of armor

events.description: entering the small antechamber through the wooden doors
turning around to exit back through the same doors

agents.ego_description: entering the small carpeted room, observing the suits of armor, then turning to exit back to the entrance hall

notable_agents.action: suit of armor standing motionless against the stone wall

entered.detail: large carved wooden doors with metal handles
ornate red patterned carpet covering the floor
medieval suits of armor standing against the walls

segments.scene_description: The character enters a small antechamber with red carpet and suits of armor standing against the walls. After a brief look around, the character turns and exits back through the large wooden doors into the entrance hall.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand stone staircase with statues and gothic windows

events.description: beginning to ascend the grand stone staircase
reaching the upper landing with view of castle exterior through tall windows

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide stone staircase, passing a large bronze statue on the landing

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes descending the stairs

entered.detail: wide stone steps with worn edges leading upward
large bronze statue of a robed figure on the landing
tall arched windows with stone tracery showing exterior view

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the grand stone staircase, passing a large bronze statue on the landing. Sunlight streams through tall gothic windows on the right, and another student descends the stairs in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: corridor with moving portraits and gothic arches

events.description: passing the moving spiral staircase structure
approaching the doorway leading to the wood-paneled hallway

agents.ego_description: walking along the portrait-lined corridor, observing the moving paintings on the walls

notable_agents.action: student walking in the opposite direction along the corridor

entered.detail: numerous framed portraits of wizards covering the stone walls
ornate stone balustrade overlooking the lower levels
architectural stone structure with spiral design connecting floors

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow corridor lined with moving wizard portraits in gilded frames. The stone balcony railing on the right overlooks lower levels, and a distinctive spiral staircase structure is visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: hallway with dark wooden pillars and benches

events.description: entering the wood-paneled hallway from the portrait corridor
slowing down as approaching the orange cat

agents.ego_description: walking through the corridor passing students in green robes, approaching a cat

notable_agents.action: group of students in green Slytherin robes conversing

entered.detail: tall dark wooden pillars supporting the ceiling
walls covered in dark polished wood panels
ginger cat standing on the marble floor

segments.scene_description: The character enters a wide hallway with dark wood paneling and tall wooden pillars. Students in green robes walk and converse in the area, and an orange cat stands in the path ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand entrance hall with circular floor pattern

events.description: kneeling down to pet the orange cat
standing up and continuing forward as the cat follows

agents.ego_description: kneeling to pet the orange cat, then standing and continuing through the hall as the cat follows

notable_agents.action: orange cat being petted then following the character

entered.detail: intricate circular stone pattern inlaid in the floor
tall stone archway leading to bright exterior light
tall bookshelves filled with books against the wall

segments.scene_description: In a grand entrance hall with a circular floor pattern, the character stops to pet the orange cat. After the interaction, the character continues walking toward a large bright archway, and the cat follows along.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the candlelit warmth of the Great Hall through the architectural grandeur of Hogwarts' interior corridors. It begins by moving past students at long wooden tables under thousands of floating candles, heading through large wooden doors into a red-carpeted antechamber lined with suits of armor. As the character exits back into the entrance hall, the scene shifts upward along a grand stone staircase where sunlight streams through gothic windows, before transitioning into a narrow corridor featuring moving portraits and a stone balcony. The environment then opens into a wide hallway of dark wood paneling and tall pillars where students in green robes gather, eventually leading into a grand entrance hall with a circular floor pattern. Finally, the camera lingers as the character stops to pet an orange cat before they both proceed together toward a large, bright archway.
